design_philosophy: Clean, minimal interface, Conversation-first experience, Large whitespace, Soft neutral color palette, Subtle borders and shadows, Rounded corners, Clear typography hierarchy, Low visual noise.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter or generic sans for headings. Use Spectral for a warm, editorial, intelligent AI feel, paired with Figtree for highly legible chat content.

layout_and_spacing.side_panel: fixed top-0 right-0 h-full w-full md:w-[400px] bg-white border-l border-[#E5E3D8] shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] z-40 transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-out
layout_and_spacing.input_dock: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-gradient-to-t from-[#F9F8F6] via-[#F9F8F6] to-transparent pb-8 pt-12

message_bubble.user: bg-[#F0EFEA] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-5 py-4 max-w-[85%] self-end text-[#242220] text-[15px] leading-relaxed
message_bubble.assistant: bg-transparent rounded-2xl px-2 py-4 max-w-[100%] self-start text-[#242220] font-serif text-[17px] leading-loose

input_area.container: relative w-full max-w-3xl mx-auto flex items-end gap-3 bg-white border border-[#E5E3D8] rounded-2xl p-2.5 shadow-sm focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-[#E5E3D8] focus-within:border-[#242220] transition-all duration-200
input_area.textarea: w-full bg-transparent border-none focus:ring-0 resize-none py-2 px-1 text-[15px] max-h-48 text-[#242220] placeholder:text-[#9A958F]
input_area.action_menu_trigger: p-2 text-[#6B6661] hover:text-[#242220] rounded-xl hover:bg-[#F0EFEA] transition-colors flex-shrink-0 mb-0.5
input_area.send_button: p-2 text-white bg-[#242220] hover:bg-[#3E3C3A] rounded-xl transition-colors flex-shrink-0 mb-0.5

signal_pill.base: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[11px] font-medium border

action_buttons.approve: bg-[#242220] text-white hover:bg-[#3E3C3A] rounded-xl px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors w-full flex justify-center items-center
action_buttons.reject: bg-white text-[#242220] border border-[#E5E3D8] hover:bg-[#F0EFEA] rounded-xl px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors w-full flex justify-center items-center
action_buttons.challenge: bg-white text-[#9A3412] border border-[#FED7AA] hover:bg-[#FFF6ED] rounded-xl px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors w-full flex justify-center items-center

decision_badge.base: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium border mt-3

interaction_and_motion.hover_states: Use subtle background shifts for interactive elements. Avoid heavy drop shadows on hover.
interaction_and_motion.panel_slide: TranslateX(100%) to TranslateX(0) with 300ms ease-out. Ensure smooth easing.

testing_requirements.data_testid: ALL interactive elements MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case format. E.g., 'data-testid="checkpoint-trigger-button"', 'data-testid="approve-action-button"', 'data-testid="chat-input-textarea"'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using pure React and Tailwind CSS. Use customized Shadcn components where logic is complex (like the action dropdown menu), but ensure they match this paper-like, flat aesthetic.
Add 'Spectral' and 'Figtree' to the project via Google Fonts.
Implement the Checkpoint Review as a sliding Side Panel on the right side of the screen (NOT a centered modal), pushing or overlaying the main content subtly.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to all buttons, menus, inputs, and inline decision badges for robust testing.
Do NOT implement dark mode. The application is strictly Light theme.
Keep spacing generous. Use padding `p-6` or `p-8` inside the side panel to let content breathe.
Do not use generic blue tones for primary actions; use the specified dark charcoal (#242220) to mimic Anthropic's muted, professional aesthetic.
Use Lucide-React for all icons to maintain low visual noise.
